Gian Luca
Buoncompagni

Curriculum Vitae

  • Milan, Italy
  • +39 339 7794186
  • gbuonc@gmail.com
  • www.gianlucabuoncompagni.net
    linkedin.com/in/gbuoncompagni
    github.com/gbuonc

Engineering Manager and front-end specialist with more than 20 years of experience in building and scaling SaaS platforms. Strong in bridging business needs and technical execution, collaborating with internal and external stakeholders to deliver complex, feature-rich applications.

Expert in frontend architecture, micro-frontends, and high-performance interfaces, with experience contributing to product evolution and roadmap definition in multi-tenant environments.

Core Skills

Frontend Architecture & Engineering

Micro-frontends (Module Federation), scalable SaaS architectures, design systems

Product & Strategy

Feature ownership, stakeholder collaboration, requirements definition, roadmap contribution and platform evolution

Tech Stack

TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), React, NextJs, React Router, Tanstack Query, i18next, Vuejs

Design Systems:

Shadcn/UI, Tailwind CSS, Chakra UI, Material UI, Emotion, css-in-js

3D Technologies

Threejs, React Three Fiber, WebGL, Drei, WebGL

Tooling & DevOps

Nx, Webpack 5, Vite, Azure DevOps, Cloudflare

Testing & Quality

Jest, Cypress, Playwright, Sentry

AI

Generative AI integration, agent-based workflows

Agile methodologies

Scrum, Kanban

Professional experience

December 2020 - Present

Head of front end and Platform Integration at Tailoor Spa

  • Led the frontend architecture and development teams for a multi-tenant e-commerce SaaS platform
  • Translated business requirements into scalable technical solutions
  • Collaborated with product, sales, and operations to define features and support roadmap
  • Designed a micro-frontend ecosystem enabling modular product evolution
  • Delivered advanced 3D configurators for web and mobile
  • Defined integration strategy via APIs and web components
  • Contributed to AI-driven features and automation workflows
  • Managed distributed teams and cross-functional stakeholders

September 2018 - December 2020

Head of front end at Vivaticket Spa

  • Led frontend development for an international B2C platform
  • Collaborated with product stakeholders on features and content tools
  • Coordinated international teams and legacy integrations

May 2014 - August 2018

Senior front end developer at Editoriale Il Fatto Spa

  • Developed and optimized the national news platform ilfattoquotidiano.it (~1.6M daily views)
  • Contributed to product features, integrations, and monetization

Earlier Experiences (2000 - 2014)

  • Senior Frontend Developer at Zodiak Active Srl
  • Frontend Developer / Multimedia Specialist (Fullsix SpA and others)

SELECTED HIGHLIGHTS

Education

  • - AVIS blood donor since 1994
